_comment: Standardised backtest cost assumptions (BR-05 / WP-86). spread_points is the FULL bid/ask spread in instrument points; the engine charges half per fill against mid-based bar data. slippage_points is extra adverse points per fill on top of the half-spread. commission_per_side is flat account-currency per fill (index CFDs here are spread-only). Values are conservative desk assumptions from advertised broker minimum spreads plus off-peak widening margin - verify against live demo snapshot quotes before treating as final (see docs/backtest-cost-assumptions.md).

US500.cash.notes: Verified 2026-07-16 vs demo 1m BID/ASK bars (~70h): fixed schedule, 0.4 US cash session / 0.6 off-peak. p90 0.6 exceeded prior 0.5.

AU200.cash.notes: Verified 2026-07-16 vs demo 1m BID/ASK bars (~78h): fixed schedule, 1.0 ASX cash session / 4.0 SYCOM/off-peak. p90 4.0 exceeded prior 1.2; single-knob model must cover the dominant off-peak regime. Bimodal - consider session-aware costs if strategies trade mostly in-session.

US500.cash.notes: Verified 2026-07-16 vs IG demo 1m bar bid/ask (~25h): 0.36 US cash session / 0.6 off-peak (brief 1.5 max). p90 0.6 matches config; unchanged.

AU200.cash.notes: Verified 2026-07-16 vs IG demo 1m bar bid/ask (~25h): 0.9 ASX cash session / 2.0-4.0 off-peak, p90 4.0 exceeded prior 1.5. Bimodal - see forexcom AU200 note.

US500.proxy.notes: Proxy data backtests should charge the costs of the venue we would trade on; mirrors forexcom US500.cash (verified 2026-07-16).

AU200.proxy.notes: Mirrors forexcom AU200.cash for the same reason (verified 2026-07-16).
